text: Nex playground in my opinion is an absolute must. It is so fun for the kids, and for the entire family.
text_zh: 我觉得Nex playground是必备的。孩子们玩得开心，全家人都开心。

text: The WII connect has been resurrected
text_zh: Wii Connect 复活了

text: The children yearn for the Wii
text_zh: 孩子们渴望 Wii

text: At this point bring Wii back💔
text_zh: 这个时候不如让Wii回来吧💔

text: for $300
text_zh: 三佰刀

text: that looks fun
text_zh: 看起来挺好玩的

text: They would add this after I canceled that high ass subscription 😒😒
text_zh: 他们在我取消那个贵死人的订阅后才推出这个 😒😒

text: no bc xbox also has a bluey game that’s free with game pass and it’s two player so you can play with your babe and teach them
text_zh: 不是吧，Xbox 也有个免费的 Bluey 游戏，是 Game Pass 里的，双人玩的，你可以和你宝贝一起玩，教他

text: Cooking mama but Bluey version, LOVE it! I cannot wait tog eat the Nex for my daughter ❤
text_zh: 做饭妈妈的蓝盒子版本，爱了爱了！我等不及要把Nex给我女儿了 ❤

text: Ok question before we take the leap and get it for the family… does it have dance games like just dance??
text_zh: 在给全家买之前，我们先问个问题…它有像Just Dance那样的跳舞游戏吗？？

text: Why is it $300 and then you have to pay a monthly subscription to get the games 😩😩
text_zh: 为什么卖 300 美元，然后你还得每个月付订阅费才能玩到游戏 😩😩

text: It even uses the cooking mama sounds 😩
text_zh: 它甚至还有烹饪妈妈的声音 😩

text: Wii is better
text_zh: Wii 更好

text: This reminds me of cooking mamma on the DS when I was a kid 😭
text_zh: 这让我想起我小时候在 DS 上玩的 Cooking Mama 😭

text: It will be on YouTube next week for free. I’ll wait
text_zh: 下周 YouTube 上就免费有了。我等

text: I don’t know I’m torn on this. I fell in love with the idea but another subscription to add to the list? Is it really worth it. I’ve heard they only add like one new game a year. It’s still in the Christmas list but someone help me make up my mind.
text_zh: 我不知道，我有点犹豫。我爱上了这个想法，但又要多一个订阅？真的值吗？我听说他们一年只加一个新游戏。它还在圣诞愿望清单上，但有人能帮我下定决心吗。

text: omg. I've had this for months and never know this game was up there
text_zh: 天哪。我玩这个几个月了，居然不知道这个游戏在这里！

text: I’m currently BEGGING grandma to buy this for my kids lma
text_zh: 我现在正求着我奶奶给我孩子买这个哈哈哈哈

text: What is the sale though? It’s the same amount in store am I missing a code
text_zh: 到底打几折？店里也这个价啊，我是不是漏了什么码？

text: People talking about a subscription but I thought you pay $89 ONCE and that’s good for the whole year for unlimited games
text_zh: 人们在说订阅，但我以为是每年付一次 $89，然后全年无限畅玩

text: Anyone who doesn’t want theirs can send it to me I’ll take it
text_zh: 谁不想要的可以寄给我，我收下

text: in
text_zh: 进

text: How much is the subscription?
text_zh: 订阅多少钱？

text: Hmm now I’m thinking about getting the wii
text_zh: 嗯，现在我倒想买个wii了

text: The bluey game is actually so fun for my daughter! She’s 4 and is still learning spacial awareness so this game is perfect for her!
text_zh: 蓝精灵那个游戏我女儿玩得超开心！她4岁，还在学空间方位感，这个游戏太适合她了！

text: COOKING MAMAAAAA
text_zh: 妈呀，太好吃了！

text: Do you buy individual games or does it come with it ? Or a subscription?
text_zh: 你是单独买游戏，还是它自带？或者有订阅服务？

text: Yall go to a old V stock store and get a will for half the price my son loves my old Wii
text_zh: 你们去二手店买个Wii，价格便宜一半，我儿子可喜欢我旧的Wii了

text: the children yearn for cooking mama
text_zh: 孩子们渴望料理妈妈

text: I’m so happy I have my childhood Wii
text_zh: 我真开心我还有童年的Wii

text: teddy tint
text_zh: 泰迪布

text: are the games free?
text_zh: 游戏免费吗？

text: So how many games do you automatically get with the year subscription (not including the couple of games they add monthly) like if i bought today & did the subscription how many games do we get off thr bat
text_zh: 那这一年的订阅（不包括每月新增的几个游戏）你们自动获得多少个游戏？比如我今天买下并订阅，一开始能玩多少个游戏？

text: ب٥
text_zh: ب٥

text: What age is this best for do you think?
text_zh: 你觉得这个最适合什么年龄？

text: Do yall think my 3y/o would enjoy this or wait a couple years
text_zh: 你们觉得我3岁的小孩会喜欢这个还是等几年再买？

text: Is it two player? cuz I got twins lol
text_zh: 是双人游戏吗？因为我有对双胞胎 lol

text: Does the device work in Mexico?
text_zh: 这个设备在墨西哥能用吗？

text: Don’t you not even get to pick what games you get though and isn’t there a subscription for the games ?
text_zh: 你不应该连自己能玩什么游戏都选不了，而且玩游戏还要订阅费吧？

text: I just got this and I can only find one bluey game
text_zh: 我刚买了，但只能找到一个Bluey的游戏

text: Only Christmas gift that we've ever used consistently
text_zh: 唯一一个我们一直都在用的圣诞礼物

text: should I ask for this for Christmas (Im 19)
text_zh: 我19岁了，我应该要这个当圣诞礼物吗？

text: i just wanna know where you got the picture frame from lol
text_zh: 就是想知道你相框哪儿买的 lol

text: Do you have to buy the games to play on it? This looks so cool!
text_zh: 这玩意儿得花钱买游戏玩吗？看起来太酷了！

text: I’ve seen some videos with a remote, does it come with it? Or is it a separate buy?
text_zh: 我看到一些视频里有遥控器，这个会附带吗？还是需要单独购买？

text: Just get a wii ... 😭💀
text_zh: 直接买个Wii不就得了… 😭💀

text: what is this game name?
text_zh: 这是什么游戏？

text: What in the cooking mama is this
text_zh: 这是什么黑暗料理模拟器？

text: Do you choose the games you want or is that where the subscription comes in. Also after the games are added do you get to keep them and do all games work without the subscription
text_zh: 是你们自己选游戏还是订阅包含游戏。另外游戏加进去之后能一直玩吗，所有游戏都需要订阅才能玩吗？

text: I need just dance!!!
text_zh: 我需要《舞力全开》！！！

text: Ummm Xbox Kinect
text_zh: 嗯...Xbox Kinect

text: How many players?
text_zh: 多少人玩？

text: A camera watching my living room, im good
text_zh: 一个摄像头看着我的客厅，我没事

text_zh: 是的，买给“我女儿”....

text: I am so proud of you nex playground had mine for a year said screw and paid for the subscription when i got it best decision made. There really isnt a day that goes by its not turned on. They add games like every month as well and i like to even do the workout on there to help keep memoving when i get up in the morning all in one great system! I try to convince all my friends and family with kids to get one ❤️
text_zh: 我为你感到骄傲，Nex Playground 我买了一年了，后悔当初没选它，然后付了订阅费，这是我做过的最好的决定。几乎每天它都在开着。他们每个月都会加新游戏，我喜欢在上面做锻炼，早上起床的时候也能让我动起来，真是个很棒的系统！我努力说服我所有的朋友和有孩子的家人都买一个 ❤️
